name: calculate_layer_mean
description: Compute mean, standard deviation, and 25/50/75 percentiles for a layer over a named geographic region. Minor typos or paraphrased layer names are normalized automatically; the Copilot confirms the intent to calculate averages when necessary.

layer_name.description: Layer display name or alias. Minor typos and paraphrased names are auto-corrected.

time_start.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp representing the start of the analysis window.

time_end.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp representing the end of the analysis window.
